u1.title: Unit 1 Guest Guide — 136 Marine Parade, Southport
u1.description: Full guest guide for Unit 1 at 136 Marine Parade, Southport — keys, Wi-Fi, parking, house rules, and everything else you need.

u21.title: Unit 21 Guest Guide — 136 Marine Parade, Southport
u21.description: Full guest guide for Unit 21 at 136 Marine Parade, Southport — keys, Wi-Fi, kitchen, laundry, house rules, and everything else you need.

home.title: 136 Marine Parade, Southport — Guest Guide
home.description: Everything you need for your stay at 136 Marine Parade, Southport — Unit 1 and Unit 21.

acc.houseRulesFinePrint: Breaking these rules may result in immediate cancellation of your stay.
acc.wifiLocked: 🔒 Wi-Fi details are available via the link in your booking confirmation.
acc.hostLockedNote: 🔒 Your host's name and direct contact details are shared with your booking confirmation.

common.oolPublicBody: Bus 777 to Broadbeach North, then tram to Southport. About a 1 km walk from the stop.
common.bnePublicBody: Airtrain to Helensvale, then tram to Southport. About a 1 km walk.
common.gettingAroundBody: The G:link tram connects Southport, Surfers Paradise, and Broadbeach. Tap your credit or debit card on boarding and off on exit, or pick up a Go Card at any station. Fares are currently 50 cents per journey.
common.onArrivalAlert: Please don't ask reception for help or information — they don't assist Airbnb guests. Everything you need is right here, or message us on Airbnb.
common.arrivalStep1Body: We'll meet you in person or leave the key in a secure spot, agreed with you before you arrive.
common.arrivalStep2Body: Buzz Unit 21 on the intercom at the main entrance — that's where we live, and we'll let you in or come down to meet you.

poi.petersHouse: Cheap, cheerful and gloriously eccentric — a budget favourite, not fine dining

emergency.footnote: Gold Coast University Hospital: 1 Hospital Blvd, Southport QLD 4215. For anything about the apartment itself, message us first through Airbnb — in a genuine emergency, always call 000 first.

u1.title: Southport Family Stay
u1.lede: A complete two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment on the 1st floor — secure underground parking, a balcony over the pool, and the whole place to yourselves.
features: Two bedrooms, each with a bathroom practically to itself
Fast Wi-Fi — NBN fibre to the building with a Wi-Fi 7 access point
Travel cot included, just ask and we'll have it made up

carousel.cap1: The lounge opens onto a pool-view window
carousel.cap2: Two bright bedrooms, room to unpack
carousel.cap3: A full kitchen — induction cooktop, oven, air fryer
carousel.cap5: Sink into the sofa after a day at the beach
carousel.cap6: Two full bathrooms, no queue for the shower
carousel.cap7: Your balcony over the pool, lit up at dusk

medley: Full kitchen: induction, oven, air fryer & coffee
Travel cot, made up on request
u1.keysAccessBody: You'll receive two keys: a gray key fob for the main entrance and lift, and a larger key for the apartment door — turn it counterclockwise to open.
u1.keysAccessLocked: 🔒 Car park access details are shared with your booking confirmation.
u1.acComfortBody: The air conditioner is in the living area. It cools the apartment well, but for the bedrooms to cool down effectively, keep the doors open slightly.
houseRules: No smoking, vaping, or illicit drugs anywhere inside the apartment, on the balcony, by the pool, or in any common area of the building.
No parties or events — please keep noise considerate of the neighbours.
Only guests included in the booking may stay at or use the apartment.
u1.poolBody: You have full access to the outdoor pool and jacuzzi, including the deck chairs and seating.
u1.safetyBody: Use your key fob for building and lift access, and make sure doors close behind you.
u1.laundryBody: Use the Quick 30 cycle for a fast wash, or Cotton Quick for something more thorough. Two detergent capsules are provided — place one directly in the drum. Prefer liquid detergent? Use the left drawer slot (marked II); fabric softener goes in the middle slot. If you use the dryer, clean the lint filter between loads.
u1.parkingBody: One reserved space in the secure underground car park is included with this apartment.
u1.parkingLocked: 🔒 Your exact car space number and directions are shared with your booking confirmation.
u1.parkingMapCaption: Turn 180° left after the entry ramp — Car Space 1 is at the far end, on the left.
u1.visitorParking: Visitors: there are two visitor spaces on the ground level of the car park — the last two bays on the south side of the building. They're first-come, first-served, so have a back-up in mind on a busy day.
u1.streetParking: Free street parking is also available outside the building, and paid parking is a short walk away at Broadwater Parklands.

u21.title: Southport Waterfront Haven
u21.lede: A private ensuite room on the 5th floor, in the home of your Finnish host Jani — high enough for water views, with a bathroom that's genuinely your own.
features: 5th floor · Broadwater views from the balcony
Private ensuite — no crossing the apartment
Own fridge, Dyson fan, desk & ergonomic chair
4K Samsung TV with Netflix & streaming apps

carousel.cap2: Your private room, high on the 5th floor
carousel.cap3: A private ensuite that's genuinely your own
carousel.cap4: 4K Samsung TV with Netflix and streaming
carousel.cap5: Your own fridge, kettle and Dyson fan
carousel.cap6: A proper desk and ergonomic chair

medley: Your own fridge, kettle & Dyson fan
Blockout blind for a proper sleep-in
u21.keysAccessBody: You'll receive three keys: a gray key fob for the main entrance and lift, a larger key for the apartment door (turn counterclockwise to open), and a smaller key that locks your private room door.
u21.acComfortBody: The apartment has air conditioning, plus your own Dyson fan in the room for extra airflow whenever you want it.
u21.acComfortLocked: 🔒 Tips for the best temperature in your room are shared with your booking confirmation.
houseRules: No smoking inside the apartment or on the balconies.
Only registered guests — no unlisted visitors.
u21.poolBody: You have full access to the outdoor pool, jacuzzi, and BBQ, including deck chairs and seating. Ask us if you'd like a beach towel.
u21.safetyBody: Use your key fob for building and lift access, and make sure doors close behind you. Your room has its own lock, and the ensuite bathroom's outer door has a latch you can push down for extra privacy.
u21.roomAmenitiesBody: Your room comes with a modern Dyson fan for airflow on demand, a kettle with coffee and tea, your own fridge, a desk with a proper office chair, and a cassette blockout blind so you can sleep in even with the sun up.
u21.roomAmenitiesFinePrint: Cooking isn't included in this stay, but you're welcome to the filtered cold water dispenser, cups, and utensils in the kitchen.
u21.fridgeBody: Your fridge space: the top shelf is yours to use. Need more room? There's space in the freezer drawer too — just let us know if you're struggling to fit everything in.
u21.kitchenUseBody: Using the kitchen: you're welcome to the cooktop (induction), oven (induction), microwave, air fryer, kettle, toaster, and sandwich maker. Ask us for a quick rundown on the induction cooktop and oven if you haven't used one before — if you want to use the oven the conventional way, the induction plate needs to come out first.
u21.dishesBody: Leave dirty dishes in the sink and we'll put them away, or load the dishwasher yourself. Avoid metal utensils on the Teflon cookware.
u21.smokeDetectorBody: The smoke detectors are very sensitive — when cooking anything smoky or steamy, pull the rangehood fully open and crack the balcony door for ventilation.
u21.tapWaterBody: Tap water is safe to drink, plus there's a filtered water dispenser in the fridge door and an ice compartment in the freezer.
u21.laundryBody: The washing machine is just outside your room, opposite the door — an LG TwinWash, with a full-size washer up top and a small pedestal washer built into the base for quick, small loads.
laundrySteps: Use the lower TwinWash pedestal to wash small loads faster.
Use the top washer for normal-sized loads.
Turn the machine on from the switch in the top right corner.
Use the round control panel to choose which washer (top or bottom), then pick your program.
Detergent is dispensed automatically — no need to add your own.
u21.twinwashCap3: Lower pedestal, for quick small loads
u21.laundryDryerBody: You're welcome to use the dryer too — choose a 45–60 minute cycle and clean the lint filter after. An iron and ironing board are available, and there's a drying rack on the balcony if you'd rather air-dry. Staying longer? Just ask if you need fresh linen or towels.

home.locationTitle: Right in the Middle of It
home.locationBody: 136 Marine Parade sits on the Broadwater, an easy tram ride from Surfers Paradise and Broadbeach.
home.hostBody: Open your unit's full guest guide above for keys, Wi-Fi, parking, and everything else you'll need. For anything else, message us first through Airbnb.
